description_long: An elderly man stands upright, dressed in a long, brown, hooded robe that reaches his ankles. His robe appears to be made of a coarse, textured fabric with a slightly darker gradient at the bottom. He has a bald head with a thin headband, a long, white beard, and a pronounced mustache, giving him a wise and distinguished appearance. His hands are visible at his sides, and his facial features include deep-set eyes and prominent cheekbones. The robe is loose-fitting, with wide sleeves and a visible seam running down the back. The overall look is reminiscent of a monk or sage, with a simple yet dignified presence.
description: An elderly man in a long, brown hooded robe with a bald head, white beard, and headband, standing upright with a dignified appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the man's facial features, long white beard, headband, and the front of his brown robe.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of his face, the length of his beard, and the drape of the robe along his body.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of his bald head, the hood, and the seam running down the back of the robe.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the opposite profile, beard, and the robe's texture and fit along his side.
attribute_clothing_style: Long, hooded brown robe with wide sleeves, simple and loose-fitting, no visible patterns or accessories except a headband.
attribute_hairstyle: bald with a long white beard and mustache, no visible scalp hair
attribute_facial_features: long white beard, pronounced mustache, deep-set eyes, prominent cheekbones, no glasses
